_comment_top: R6 Wave 8 — seed row for the DocumentSearchHandler 'SearchDiscovery' method. Replaces the second of the two legacy hardcoded LLM functions previously registered on DocumentSearchTools (removed from SprkChatAgentFactory.ResolveTools).
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'DocumentSearchHandler'. The handler reads sprk_configuration.method = 'SearchDiscovery' to dispatch to the broad tenant-wide (or parent-entity-scoped) discovery pipeline.
_comment_method_dispatch: Two rows (DOCUMENT-SEARCH / DOCUMENT-DISCOVERY) share one handler class — same pattern as KnowledgeRetrievalHandler (Wave 7c). Each row's sprk_configuration.method discriminator selects the internal method.
_comment_design: Capability gate: NOT set. DocumentDiscovery was always-available pre-Wave-7b (gated only by IRagService presence) and remains so per Wave 8 design. Leave sprk_requiredcapability null (default — always-available per Wave 7b filter semantics).
_comment_scope: Intentionally NOT knowledge-scoped — discovery casts a wider net than SearchDocuments. When ChatInvocationContext.KnowledgeScope carries ParentEntityType + ParentEntityId (host-context bound), discovery is constrained to that parent-entity boundary; otherwise discovery remains tenant-wide. Uses MinScore=0.5 (lower than SearchDocuments) and truncates excerpts to 300 chars for preview.
_comment_widget: This method emits an output_pane SearchResults widget via ToolResult.Metadata.widget with isDiscovery=true (R6 Wave 7b adapter post-processing). The widget rendering is unchanged from the pre-R6 DocumentSearchTools.SearchDiscoveryAsync behavior (Gap-1 fix preserved).
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_handlerclass + sprk_toolcode + sprk_name 'SYS-%' filter; UPSERTs.
sprk_description: Performs a broad discovery search across all indexed documents for the tenant. Use this when exploring what documents are available or finding related content across the entire document corpus — not limited to a specific knowledge source. When the chat session has a host-context parent entity (e.g., matter, project), discovery is automatically constrained to that entity's boundary. Returns ranked excerpts with preview snippets and citation markers; the UI receives a SearchResults output-pane widget (with isDiscovery=true) alongside the text response.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). FR-12 acceptance: invocable from both playbook orchestration and chat-driven function calling.

sprk_jsonschema.title: DocumentSearchHandler.SearchDiscovery Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of the SearchDiscovery method. The 'query' is the broad discovery search text; optional 'topK' caps the number of results returned.

query.description: Broad discovery search across all documents. Uses a lower relevance threshold than SearchDocuments to cast a wider net.

topK.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 10 if omitted; clamped to [1, 20].

sprk_configuration._comment: method = 'SearchDiscovery' is the dispatch discriminator. This row exposes only the broad discovery method.
